name: Green Noodles with Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and slice mushrooms and onions. Cut the bacon into small pieces and sauté in the oil for a couple minutes; add mushrooms and sauté until all the liquid is evaporated.
2. In the meantime, prepare noodles as directed.
3. Add the cream and broth to the mushroom-onion mix and let it simmer 5 minutes; season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Wash and chop basil finely; add to the mix shortly before serving.
5. Serve sauce over the noodles, sprinkle parmesan over all.
